mapper.select: SELECT si.id AS id, si.supplier_id AS supplierId, si.material_id AS materialId, si.unit_price AS unitPrice, si.unit AS unit, si.supply_available AS supplyAvailable, si.note AS note, DATE_FORMAT(si.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, DATE_FORMAT(si.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt, si.price_unit AS priceUnit, si.conv_to_base AS convToBase, si.pack_qty AS packQty, si.min_order_qty AS minOrderQty, si.order_multiple AS orderMultiple, m.material_name AS materialName, m.material_type AS materialType, m.unit AS materialUnit, /* base_unit 컬럼 없음! */ m.warehouse_code AS warehouseCode FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON si.material_id = m.material_id WHERE si.supplier_id = #{supplierId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier_item WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId}
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_item SET unit_price = #{unitPrice}, unit = #{unit}, note = #{note}, supply_available = #{supplyAvailable}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT si.*, m.material_name, m.material_type FROM supplier_item si JOIN material m ON si.material_id = m.material_id WHERE si.id = #{itemId}
